query_title: Guinea Pig Part 2: Flower of Flesh and Blood

recommendations.title: Pyewacket
recommendations.overview: A frustrated, angry teenage girl awakens something in the woods when she naively performs an occult ritual to invoke a witch to kill her mother.

recommendations.title: Queen of the Damned
recommendations.overview: Vampire Lestat awakens from his slumber and becomes a rock star. But chaos strikes when his music awakens Akasha, the vampire queen, who may not rest until she makes Lestat her new king.

recommendations.title: A Dark Song
recommendations.overview: A determined young woman and a damaged occultist risk their lives and souls to perform a dangerous ritual that will grant them what they want.

recommendations.title: Premonition
recommendations.overview: A depressed housewife who learns her husband was killed in a car accident the day previously, awakens the next morning to find him alive and well at home, and then awakens the day after to a world in which he is still dead.

recommendations.title: Buried Alive
recommendations.overview: A college prank at an abandoned house accidentally awakens a frightening spirit.

recommendations.title: Happy Hunting
recommendations.overview: An alcoholic drifter must battle withdrawal and psychotic rednecks after he becomes the target of a deranged sporting event.

recommendations.title: Ju-On: Black Ghost
recommendations.overview: The supernatural grudge manifests itself by way of a strange cyst growing in the body of a young woman, slowly draining all life from her in revenge for... what?

recommendations.title: The Boy Behind the Door
recommendations.overview: Bobby tries to save himself and his best friend when they are kidnapped on their way home from school.

recommendations.title: Visiting Hours
recommendations.overview: A deranged, misogynistic killer assaults a journalist. When he discovers that she survived the attack, he follows her to the hospital to finish her off.

recommendations.title: Seance
